description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly pink and black color scheme. It is equipped with a large scope mounted on the top rail, suggesting it is intended for precision shooting at long distances. The stock is ergonomically shaped with a thumbhole and pistol grip, providing enhanced control and comfort for the user. The barrel is long and robust, ending in a prominent muzzle device that appears to be a muzzle brake or compensator. The magazine is detachable and box-shaped, located just in front of the trigger guard. Additional details include a curved foregrip and various mounting points for accessories, giving the rifle a highly customized and functional appearance.
description: A modern pink and black tactical rifle with a large scope, thumbhole stock, long barrel, and detachable box magazine. Features include a prominent muzzle device and ergonomic grips.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the scope, thumbhole stock, pistol grip, and muzzle device.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle device and the alignment of the barrel and scope.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, curved foregrip, and detailed stock design.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock, pistol grip, and the back of the scope.
